## Player.getPlugin() method

Returns a registered core plugin instance by name, or `null` if not found.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getPlugin(name: string): any;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>

name


</td><td>

</td><td>


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

any

## Example


```ts
const tokenRefresh = player.getPlugin('token_refresh') as TokenRefreshPlugin | null
```
